extra.reason: Fixed: tokenize loop uses p/l/c/o, not pos/line/col/off — avoids conflict with tree.rkt::pos function
Fixed: gen-match-seq wraps single-element matchers as ((lambda ...) p in), not bare expressions
Fixed: parser helpers return lists, not values. gen-parser-seq generates nested (let ... (and ri ...)) chains that check for #f before using car
All sub-bugs fixed. Generator produces working parsers that correctly parse JSON.
Duplicate of racklr-8pz (created when dependency syntax failed on first attempt)
Duplicate of racklr-bkf (created when dependency syntax failed on first attempt)
Fixed in previous session: build-implicit-lexer-rules now uses #:start and #:end keyword arguments
Fixed in previous session: gen-match-elem now handles 'negated' tag with mnot wrapper
Fixed in previous session: gen-match-elem token-ref case uses mangle function
Fixed in previous session: JSON parsing works, token-type mismatch resolved with pipe-quoting fix
Fixed in previous session: expect-lit checks token-value (string), pipe-quoting fixed to only quote non-identifiers
Fixed in previous session: pipe-quote regex narrowed to only quote non-identifiers like {, }, [, ]

Python3 parser now generating and parsing from grammars-v4. Generated module accepts tokenize/parse. Key fixes: option token-id values, non-greedy suffixes (*? +?), action filtering, Unicode property classes in cc-match, lexer literal unescaping, newline-preserving tokenizer. Left-recursive expr rule produces warnings but base case (atom_expr) works.
Lowering pass created in lower-json.rkt: lower-json maps JSON CST (from generated parser) to UIR nodes. Full test coverage with round-trip verification.

Code generator created in emit-json.rkt: emit-json maps UIR nodes to JSON text. Supports compact and pretty-printed output. Round-trip testing (JSON → parse → lower → emit → parse → lower) verifies equivalence.

UIR schema document created at docs/uir-schema.md. Lists all 7 Tier 0 node types with struct fields, descriptions, and JSON CST lowering examples. Includes serialization format specs and planned future node types.

UIR epic complete: uir.rkt defines 7 Tier 0 struct types (null, bool, number, string, list, record, symbol) with full serialization. Schema documented in docs/uir-schema.md. JSON CST → UIR lowering pass working in lower-json.rkt. UIR → JSON text code generator in emit-json.rkt. All with round-trip tests.

Lexer modes now supported. Fixed g4-parse.rkt to handle parenthesized commands (pushMode/type/channel with (NAME) syntax) and comma-separated multiple commands. gend-parser.rkt generates mode-aware tokenizer with mode stack, per-mode rule dispatch, and support for skip/more/pushMode/popMode/type commands. Verified with PropertiesLexer.g4 (3 modes). JSON parser continues to work.

SQL parser generating from SQLite grammar. Tokenizer and parser both work. Parses SELECT, DELETE, DROP statements. CREATE TABLE and INSERT need debugging (parse functions return #f). tokenVocab support added: parser grammars can import lexer rules from separate lexer grammar files. Label (= and +=) parsing fixed in g4-parse.rkt. Negated elements (~) skipped with note.

Java parser generates and loads from grammars-v4. Grammar parsing handles # alternative labels, element options (<assoc=right>), and tokenVocab imports. Tokenizer partially works - identifier matches too greedily (likely Unicode class matching issue). Generator produces 189K chars of code. Fixed: g4-lex handles < > # characters, g4-parse handles element options and alternative labels.
README.md created with project architecture documentation, component reference, generated parser design, known limitations, and instructions for adding new languages.
Grammar manifest created at manifest.yaml. Lists JSON (working), SQLite (partial), Java (tokenizing), Python3 (tokenizing). Run racket build-grammars.rkt to regenerate.

Deferred to user decision. Name resolution requires design choices: symbol-table approach vs scope-set model vs Statix/NaBL2. Current UIR has symbol nodes but no scoping. Needs user input on target languages and resolution strategy.

Deferred to user decision. Current architecture works: Racket for parser generation, generated parsers target Racket runtime. Rust could be added as a separate codegen backend (Option A). No performance bottleneck identified yet — Racket parses JSON fine for small inputs. Needs benchmarks before deciding.

Deferred to user decision. UIR already supports typed records via uir-symbol for type tags. Full type system (generics, sum types, function types) needs design based on target languages. Current JSON pipeline skips types entirely (no type info needed).
Unblocked: NEWLINE token generation fixed in gend-parser.rkt. When grammar has NEWLINE lexer rule, tokenizer preserves newlines instead of skipping them. Basic Python parsing now works.
Fixed NEWLINE token generation. Added 65 validation tests. All pass.

Implemented left-recursion elimination via iterative accumulation pattern. Split alternatives into primaries (base cases) and binaries (left-recursive), generate prim function + bin-loop accumulator. Tests: arithmetic grammar (1+2, 1+2+3) parses correctly with left-assoc CST. All 8 test suites pass.

Token greediness is caused by Unicode escape sequences (\uXXXX) in character class patterns not being unescaped. The negated pattern ~[\u0000-\u007F] matches EVERYTHING because cc-match can't parse the escapes, so IDENTIFIER greedily consumes the entire input. This is the same root cause as racklr-2tx.

Fixed Unicode escape (\uXXXX) handling in character class patterns. Key fixes: (1) Changed regex to pregexp (#px) for {n} quantifier support. (2) Fixed lambda signature for regexp-replace* with pregexp (receives matched+groups). (3) Skip surrogate code points (0xD800-0xDFFF) — leave as-is since they don't exist in Racket strings. Java IDENTIFIER now correctly tokenizes: class→CLASS, Foo→IDENTIFIER, {→LBRACE. All 8 test suites pass.

Defined 8 Tier 1 UIR structs: uir-class (name, super, fields, methods), uir-method (name, params, body, visibility), uir-field (name, type, init), uir-new (class, args), uir-interface (name, methods), uir-module (name, imports, exports, body), uir-import (source, names), uir-export (names). Full serialization round-trip (sexp + JSON) for all types. Added to uir?, uir-tag, and tag-set. 30+ new construction + round-trip tests. All 8 test suites pass.

Defined 9 Tier 2 UIR structs: uir-component, uir-element, uir-attribute, uir-event, uir-slot, uir-text-node, uir-style, uir-effect, uir-state. Full serialization round-trip (sexp + JSON). Added to predicate, tag, tag-set. 40+ new tests. All 8 test suites pass.

MVP Python3 lowering + emit pass implemented. lower-python.rkt (400 lines) walks Python3 CST and produces UIR. emit-python.rkt (117 lines) converts UIR back to Python3 text. Handles: pass, return (bare + value), assignment (x = 1, y = x), import (module + from import). Expression lowering: binary ops, comparisons, atom (names, numbers, strings, booleans, None). 13 tests in lower-python-test.rkt including round-trip verification and UIR structure inspection. All 9 test suites pass.

Implemented uir-get struct, lower-trailer for .attr and [subscript], emit support for both. 8 new tests pass.
Implemented del/global/nonlocal as uir-call to special symbols. Added lower-del, lower-global, lower-nonlocal with recursive name/expr walkers. Added emit support. 12 new tests pass.

Added name field to uir-fn struct. Threaded function name from lower-funcdef through UIR to emit-funcdef. Fixed cst-tokens → cst-tokens-deep for decorated case. Fixed all uir-fn constructors across project. All tests pass.
Added uir-fstring for f-string literals. Detected f-prefixed STRING tokens in lower-string-token, strip f+quotes into uir-fstring. Emit with f-prefix. Basic round-trip test passes.

Test suite at 131 assertions covering: pass, return, assignment, import, for, try/except/finally, with, yield, await, async def, lambda, decorators, dict/list/set/tuple, comprehensions, boolean ops, augmented assignment, attribute access, subscript, del/global/nonlocal, f-strings. Room for expansion to 200+ but coverage is solid.

All 14 sub-issues complete. Python 3 lowering + emit pass handles: pass, return, assignment, import/from, if/while, for loops, try/except/finally, with, yield/yield from, await, async def, lambda, decorators, dict/set/tuple/list literals, comprehensions, boolean operators (and/or/not), augmented assignment, attribute access, subscript, del/global/nonlocal, f-strings, function name threading. 131 tests pass.
Closed
Closed
Closed
INDENT/DEDENT lexer infrastructure works. gen-and-load-py produces parser with correct INDENT/DEDENT insertion. All 131 tests pass. Compound statements need trailing \n\n (Python REPL semantics).
Implemented lower-raise for raise/raise expr/raise expr from cause. Added emit support. 5 new tests pass. All suites green.
Replaced lower-assert with round-trippable uir-call pattern. Added emit support. 3 new tests pass.
Implemented ternary (test tag) handling in lower-expr. Added expression-form uir-if emit. 4 new tests pass.
is and in operators already worked via comparison lowering. Added infix emit for is/in/comparison/binary operators. Updated all affected test expectations. 3 new tests pass.
Sets now lower as (call set ...), tuples as (call tuple ...). Emit produces {x, y} for sets, (x,) and (x, y) for tuples, () for empty. All existing data structure tests pass.
Break and continue already round-trip correctly. Lower as (uir-block (list (uir-symbol break))) and emit correctly. No code changes needed.
Star expressions parse but the * token is dropped in lowering. Full implementation requires significant work in call args, assignment targets, and tuple/list display lowering. Deferred.
Slice parsing partially works (x[:], x[:2], x[::] parse) but explicit start values (x[1:2], x[1:2:3]) fail due to parser generator limitation. Deferred.

Added uir-paren struct to UIR, comma detection in lower-atom to distinguish parenthesized expressions from tuples, fixed cst-tokens-deep to recurse into list-wrapped children, and added emit-paren handling. 7 new tests in lower-python-test.rkt.

Added uir-ann-set! for variable annotations (x: int), uir-typed-param for function parameter types, extended uir-fn with return-type field. Updated lower-expr-stmt for annassign detection, lower-parameters for typed param extraction, lower-funcdef for return type, and emit-funcdef for annotation output. Fixed cst-tokens-deep list recursion bug. 10+ new round-trip tests.

Classes now support field extraction (x = 1, x: int = 5), method extraction (def m(self): ...), and inheritance (class Foo(Bar):). Rewrote lower-classdef with full CST walk for fields and methods, updated emit-classdef for super, fields, and methods. 6 new round-trip tests.
Class method extraction is part of the class implementation in racklr-hng.2. Methods (funcdef inside class body) are lowered to uir-method and emitted with self-param handling.
